title: Trump Claims Victory, Iran Denies Prize Offer
summary: Trump declares victory in talks with Iran, but Iran denies offering any 'prize'.
charlotte_impact: Conflicting narratives raise questions about diplomatic progress and potential for de-escalation in US-Iran relations.

title: Pentagon Prepares to Send 3,000 More Troops to Middle East
summary: The Pentagon is preparing to deploy an additional 3,000 troops to the Middle East amid rising tensions.
charlotte_impact: Escalation of military presence could further destabilize the region and increase risk of conflict.

title: Airport Disruptions as Senators Debate Homeland Security Budget
summary: Airport disruptions occur as senators negotiate a deal to end the Homeland Security budget standoff.

title: Quadruple Amputee Cornhole Player Involved in Fatal Shooting
summary: A quadruple amputee cornhole player fatally shoots a man, according to authorities.
charlotte_impact: Unusual circumstances raise questions about self-defense and the role of disability.

title: Delta Suspends Perks for Congress Due to DHS Shutdown
summary: Delta suspends 'specialty services' perk for members of Congress, citing DHS shutdown.

title: Marco Rubio Testifies in Miami Corruption Trial
summary: Senator Marco Rubio appears as a witness in a Miami corruption trial.

title: Ex-Border Patrol Chief Defends Record, Wishes for More Arrests
summary: Former border patrol chief defends his record after exit, expressing a desire to have caught more illegal aliens.

title: Minnesota Sues Federal Government Over Investigations
summary: Minnesota officials sue the federal government over Renee Good, Alex Pretti investigations.

title: ICE Agents at Airports Amid Government Shutdown Delays
summary: Photos show ICE agents at US airports experiencing delays due to the partial government shutdown.

title: Danish Election: Frederiksen on Track to Win

title: Meloni's Aura Dented by Referendum Defeat

title: LaGuardia Plane Crash: Safety System 'Did Not Alert'
